question: How much does a basement renovation cost in Burlington or Hamilton?
answer: Basement renovation costs in Burlington and Hamilton typically range from $25,000 to $120,000 depending on the scope of work. A basic finishing with drywall, flooring, and lighting starts around $25,000–$40,000. A full legal basement suite with a kitchen, bathroom, and separate entrance runs $60,000–$120,000. Factors that affect cost include square footage, ceiling height, existing plumbing and electrical, material selections, and permit requirements. We provide fixed-price quotes after a free in-home consultation so there are no surprises.
